---
title: "NN-GP — Identity Transform"
subtitle: "Experiment exp_nn_gp_none"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
---

## Overview

NN-GP model with Identity response transform on Big Sur daily streamflow.
Capacity K (hidden\_dim = 24×K) swept over K\in{{1,2,3,4}}, capacity selected by kriging CRPS on held-out tail of training period.

**Config:** m=20, ν=1.5, epochs=2600, GLS iters=6, seed=42, train: hydr\_year < 30, test: hydr\_year ≥ 30.

## Per-K Training Selection

| K | BIC\_eff | AIC\_eff | Train NSE | Train RMSE |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 10619.7 | 251445.9 | 0.9024 | 1.5002 |
| 2 | 34952.8 | 730128.3 | 0.9237 | 1.3265 |
| 3 | 53885.7 | 1493783.4 | 0.9507 | 1.0663 |
| 4 \* | 87470.3 | 2580463.9 | 0.9762 | 0.7414 |

(\* = selected model.)

## Test Performance (Best K=4)

Best model parameters: θ = (0.4798, 9.5126, 1.5000, 0.0072)

| Mode | CRPS | NSE | RMSE | MAE |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| sim | 0.7732 | 0.6862 | 2.3651 | 0.8763 |
| krig | 0.5979 | 0.7967 | 1.9040 | 0.6442 |

## Calibration

![PIT histogram — simulation](plots/pit_hist_sim_test.png){width=45%}
![PIT histogram — kriging](plots/pit_hist_krig_test.png){width=45%}

![QQ plot (RQR) — simulation](plots/qq_rqr_sim_test.png){width=45%}
![QQ plot (RQR) — kriging](plots/qq_rqr_krig_test.png){width=45%}
